prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约97名、53名、58名、2294名、1763名。2021–2023年位次极高位（前100名内），2024年起因新增护理学专业招生，校最 低位次大幅后移至2000名左右区间；2025年基准位次约1763名，较2024年有所回升，显示临床医学专业仍保持极高竞争热度，护理学专业拉低了校整体门槛；该 校在海南省招生计划：2021–2023年每年仅2人（仅临床医学），2024–2025年增至5人（新增护理学），2026年计划6人（护理学5人+临床医学1人），较2025年扩招1人（+20 %）。扩招对竞争压力有一定缓解作用，但扩招名额集中于护理学专业。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学上海医学院为985、211、双一流，隶属复旦大学（软科2026年主榜第5名），属 全国顶尖医学院校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情；但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝 光量大，反映社会关注度居高不下。历史投档异常方面，2022年河南投档线暴跌为中关注度事件，2023年投档线异常为高关注度，但均为跨省现象，对海南本地报考心理影响有限；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、药学（A）、生物医学工程（A-）。临床医学为复旦王牌学科，护理学亦为A-级优势学科，与招 生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年专业热度指数70.19（推荐/偏热），护理学68.61（推荐/偏热），医学大类整体报考热度持续高位。海南省2026年考生 总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模明显扩大，整体竞争加剧；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市， 属一线城市高校，对海南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在海南招生占比极小，属跨省招生中的小比例省份，招生计划微调对全国格局影响甚微。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准 位次1763名、2026年扩招1人（+20%）、本省考生总数增长约15.7%、医学类专业热度持续高位、学校顶尖层次与高社会关注度等因素：扩招使位次数字趋于增大（更易进），但考 生规模大幅增长及医学类专业持续高热使竞争加剧，两相权衡下竞争略趋激烈。预测2026年最低录取位次约2000名，区间1760–2240名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含护理学卓越班；含智慧康复方向、健康管理方向；含护理学-人工智能双学士学位）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1760–2240名内，建议以三档护理学为主力报考目标，一档临床医学可作为冲刺志愿（需位次明显优于区间上限）；位次若优于1760名可重点冲刺临床医学八年制 。两专业选科要求不同（临床医学需物理+化学，护理学需生物），请根据自身选科情况合理选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 97th, 53rd, 58th, 2294th, and 1763rd respectively. From 2021 to 2023, the rankings were extremely high (within the top 100). Starting from 2024, due to the addition of the Nursing major, the university's minimum ranking significantly dropped to around the 2000 range. In 2025, the baseline ranking was approximately 1763rd, showing a recovery compared to 2024, indicating that the Clinical Medicine major still maintains extremely high competition, while the Nursing major lowers the overall threshold of the university. The enrollment plan in Hainan Province: from 2021 to 2023, only 2 students per year (Clinical Medicine only); from 2024 to 2025, increased to 5 students (adding Nursing); in 2026, planned 6 students (5 for Nursing + 1 for Clinical Medicine), an increase of 1 student (+20%) compared to 2025. The expansion alleviates competitive pressure to some extent, but the increase is concentrated in the Nursing major.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class institution, affiliated with Fudan University (ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking). It is among the top-tier medical schools nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management-related public opinion. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high social attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan admission score drop was a medium-attention event, and the 2023 abnormal admission line was high-attention, but both are cross-province phenomena with limited impact on Hainan local application psychology. Disciplines: Clinical Medicine (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Nursing (A-), Pharmacy (A), Biomedical Engineering (A-). Clinical Medicine is Fudan's flagship discipline, and Nursing is also an A- level advantageous discipline, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended/slightly hot), and for Nursing was 68.61 (recommended/slightly hot). The overall application heat for the medical category remains high. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, which has a strong regional appeal to Hainan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is very small, making it a small-proportion province in cross-provincial enrollment, and minor adjustments in the enrollment plan have little impact on the national landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1763rd, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 1 student (+20%), the 15.7% increase in the number of local examinees, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the top-tier level of the university, and high social attention: the expansion tends to increase the ranking number (easier to enter), but the significant growth in candidate numbers and the sustained high heat of medical majors intensify competition. Balancing these, competition becomes slightly more intense. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 2000th, with a range of 1760–2240.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program, Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (including Nursing Excellence Class; including Smart Rehabilitation direction, Health Management direction; including Nursing-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1760–2240, it is recommended to primarily target Tier 3 Nursing as the main application goal, while Tier 1 Clinical Medicine can be used as a reach choice (requires ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range). If your ranking is better than 1760, you can focus on sprinting for Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program. The two majors have different subject requirements (Clinical Medicine requires Physics + Chemistry, Nursing requires Biology), so please choose according to your own subject selection.
